creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 247503
0001-net-p2p-sonarr-devel-Remove-port-now-sonarr-v4-lande.patch

sonarr released v4 as stable, so the net-p2p/sonarr-devel port is no longer needed to test this major upgrade on FreeBSD.
Since the other *arr ports also dont have a -devel port, this makes sonarr confirm with those as well.

Thanks all for testing sonarr v4 in the sonarr-devel port. Please move over to the net-p2p/sonarr port from now on.
